name: langsmith
description: Query LangSmith tracing projects, runs, datasets, and examples for LLM observability

tools.name: List Projects
tools.description: List tracing projects (tracer sessions) in your LangSmith workspace

offset.description: Number of projects to skip for pagination

historicalSummary.omitted: feedback statistics and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Query Runs
tools.description: Query traced runs with filters (project, trace filter expressions, root runs only)

session.description: Project (tracer session) UUIDs to query, e.g. ["<project-uuid>"]

filter.description: LangSmith filter expression, e.g. eq(status, "error") or gt(latency, "5s")

tools.name: Get Run
tools.description: Get full details of a single run, including inputs, outputs, and errors

tools.name: List Datasets
tools.description: List evaluation datasets in your LangSmith workspace

offset.description: Number of datasets to skip for pagination

tools.name: List Examples
tools.description: List examples in a LangSmith dataset

dataset.description: Dataset UUID to list examples from

offset.description: Number of examples to skip for pagination

prompts.title: Find failing traces
prompts.prompt: Query my LangSmith projects for recent runs with errors and summarize what went wrong.

prompts.title: Project overview
prompts.prompt: List my LangSmith tracing projects with their run counts and last activity.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: LangSmith API Setup

steps.title: Create a LangSmith account
steps.description: Sign up at https://smith.langchain.com — the free Developer plan includes traces for testing.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: In LangSmith go to Settings → API Keys and create a key (Personal Access Token or Service Key). Copy it immediately — it is only shown once.

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Add it to your .env file as LANGSMITH_API_KEY=lsv2_...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Projects tool. If you belong to multiple workspaces, make sure the key was created in the workspace you want to query.

notes: API keys are workspace-scoped; data from other workspaces is not visible to the key
EU-region organizations use https://eu.api.smith.langchain.com — these tools target the default US endpoint
Query Runs filter expressions are documented at https://docs.langchain.com/langsmith/trace-query-syntax
